role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script identification (Thai script) and place-name etymology.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil color, and settlement patterns consistent with the Khorat Plateau.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed tropical deciduous trees and dry-season grasses appropriate for the biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated utility pole design and road infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (roofing, shop architecture, pole hardware) to distinguish the country.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Thailand. The linguistic agent provided the strongest evidence (script), while the meta and regulatory agents reinforced this with infrastructure analysis. The tournament correctly prioritized the linguistic and meta evidence over the landscape/botanical ambiguity shared with Cambodia.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately identified Thai script on the banner.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described reddish soil and flat terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the concrete utility pole and cross-arms.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described the open-fronted shop and roof styles.
